text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, McQueen! Wanna play 
baseball together?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You go to games pretty regularly, right? 
I need a teammate, so I figured you'd be 
the one to ask!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I happened to hear you talking to Golshi, 
that's all♪ A fan like you must've played 
a game or two, right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Then let's play! That should be just 
as fun as watching, right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Especially when you hit the ball! 
The sound of the metal bat colliding 
with the ball is the best!♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
W-Well… I suppose you leave me 
with no choice but to ——

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! We needed an umpire to play, 
so this is perfect!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Umpire?! Now hold on! The umpire 
doesn't get to hit the ball at all!!
